description: Create and apply a Catalog Price Rule named 'SUMMER_CLEARANCE_2025' that provides a 20% discount to all products in the 'Electronics' category. Configure the rule as Active for the 'Main Website' and 'NOT LOGGED IN' and 'General' customer groups. Set the date range from 06/01/2025 to 08/31/2025 with a priority of 2. Use the 'Discount by Percentage of the Original Price' action with a discount amount of 20 and set 'Stop Further Rules Processing' to 'Yes'.
